testcase.name: Google OAuth Flows › Client OAuth Flow › should display client Google OAuth button on register page

testcase.failure:

testcase.name: Google OAuth Flows › Role Selection Page › should display role selection options for practitioners

failure.message: oauth-flows.spec.js:119:5 should display role selection options for practitioners

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › oauth-flows.spec.js:119:5 › Google OAuth Flows › Role Selection Page › should display role selection options for practitioners
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('input[value="osteopath"]') Expected: visible Received: <element(s) not found> Timeout: 5000ms
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('input[value="osteopath"]')
126 | const clientOption = page.locator('input[value="client"]'); 127 | > 128 | await expect(osteopathOption).toBeVisible(); | ^ 129 | await expect(sportsTherapistOption).toBeVisible(); 130 | await expect(massageTherapistOption).toBeVisible(); 131 | await expect(clientOption).toBeVisible(); at C:\Users\rayma\Desktop\New folder\peer-care-connect\tests\oauth-flows.spec.js:128:37

testcase.failure:

Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.

159 | // Select massage therapist role 160 | const massageTherapistOption = page.locator('input[value="massage_therapist"]'); > 161 | await massageTherapistOption.check(); | ^ 162 | 163 | // Verify selection 164 | await expect(massageTherapistOption).toBeChecked(); at C:\Users\rayma\Desktop\New folder\peer-care-connect\tests\oauth-flows.spec.js:161:36

testcase.name: Google OAuth Flows › Role Selection Page › should allow selecting client role
Google OAuth Flows › Navigation and Routing › should navigate to register page
Google OAuth Flows › Navigation and Routing › should navigate to login page
Google OAuth Flows › Navigation and Routing › should navigate to role selection page
Google OAuth Flows › Navigation and Routing › should navigate to onboarding page
Google OAuth Flows › Error Handling › should handle missing session storage gracefully
Google OAuth Flows › Error Handling › should display error messages for failed operations
Google OAuth Flows › Mobile Responsiveness › should display OAuth buttons correctly on mobile
Google OAuth Flows › Mobile Responsiveness › should display role selection correctly on mobile
Google OAuth Flows › Client OAuth Flow › should display client Google OAuth button on register page
Google OAuth Flows › Client OAuth Flow › should set intendedRole to client when clicking client button
Google OAuth Flows › Client OAuth Flow › should display client Google OAuth button on login page
Google OAuth Flows › Client OAuth Flow › should set intendedRole to client when clicking client button on login
